name: Basic Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
4. Add the vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing well after each addition.
6. Form the dough into 1 1/2- to 2-inch rolls.
7. Wrap the rolls tightly in foil.
8. Chill for at least 3 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
9. Cut the chilled rolls into slices that are 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick.
10. Bake on ungreased baking sheets at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
